zh.Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandy,: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye於1025年10月14日出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特時，他的父親Gervais De Peynel26歲，母親Félicia De Crepon21歲。他和Lesceline de Fontenay至少有6個兒子。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1087年9月9日在法國諾門迪曼其哈白享年61歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye于1025年10月14日出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯萊斯 姆迪爾-波特时，他的父亲Gervais De Peynel26岁，母亲Félicia De Crepon21岁。他和Lesceline de Fontenay至少有6个儿子。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1087年9月9日在法国諾門迪曼其哈白享年61岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱。

nameMeanings.name: Guilluame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye was born on 14 October 1025, in Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Gervais De Peynel, was 26 and his mother, Félicia De Crepon, was 21. He had at least 6 sons with Lesceline de Fontenay. He registered for military service in 1066. He died on 9 September 1087, in Hambye, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Caen, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye est né le 14 octobre 1025, à Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Gervais De Peynel, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Félicia De Crepon, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Lesceline de Fontenay. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1087, à Hambye, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye am 14. Oktober 1025 in Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gervais De Peynel 26 und seine Mutter Félicia De Crepon 21. Er hatte mit Lesceline de Fontenay mindestens 6 Söhne. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1087 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye è nato il il 14 ottobre 1025 nel Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gervais De Peynel, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Félicia De Crepon, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Lesceline de Fontenay. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì il 9 settembre 1087, nel Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambyeが1025年10月14日にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスレス モウティエルス-ヒューバートで生まれた時，父Gervais De Peynelは26歳，母Félicia De Creponは21歳であった。彼はLesceline de Fontenayとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1087年9月9日にフランスノーマンディマンチェハンブイで61歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスケンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye(이)가 1025년 10월 14일 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 레스 모우티어스-후버트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gervais De Peynel(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Félicia De Crepon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lesceline de Fontenay(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1087년 9월 9일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 햄비에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 카이에 묻혔다.

mn.14 October 1025–9 September 1087: 1025 оны Аравдугаар сарын 14–1087 оны Есдүгээр сарын 9

pt.14 October 1025–9 September 1087: 14 de outubro de 1025–9 de setembro de 1087
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye nasceu em 14 de outubro de 1025, em Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gervais De Peynel, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Félicia De Crepon, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Lesceline de Fontenay. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1087, em Hambye, Manche, Normandie, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye родился 14 октября 1025 г. в местности лесь моутиирс-хубирт, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gervais De Peynel было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Félicia De Crepon, 21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Lesceline de Fontenay. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1087 г. в местности хамби, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности каен, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.14 October 1025–9 September 1087: 14 de octubre de 1025–9 de septiembre de 1087
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye nació el 14 de octubre de 1025, en Les Moutiers-Hubert, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gervais De Peynel, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Félicia De Crepon, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Lesceline de Fontenay. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1087, en Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
